news.title:
Fortis Healthcare's NCDs worth ₹1,550 crore are listed on BSE, with no payment defaults.
CRISIL upgraded Fortis Healthcare's credit rating from AA to AAA with a stable outlook.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare's NCDs worth ₹1,550 crore are listed on BSE, with no payment defaults.
CRISIL upgraded Fortis Healthcare's credit rating from AA to AAA with a stable outlook.

news.title:

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.
Jefferies sees 74% upside for Aavas Financiers, targets Rs 1,875; Morgan Stanley gives cautious view, prefers Aptus and Home First Finance.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Endurance Tech, cuts target to Rs 2,900 citing demand outlook; Fortis Healthcare aims 22-25% EBITDA margin by FY26.

news.title:
Fortis Hospitals, a Fortis Healthcare unit, faces a ₹117.04 crore tax demand for AY 2024-25.
The company is considering options like filing an appeal or rectification application.

Airspace restrictions and shipping detours may slow patient flows, raising logistics costs.

news.title:
Fortis Healthcare's promoter filed a legal claim in Tokyo court against Daiichi Sankyo, seeking damages of INR 109.3B.
The claim includes defamation and share acquisition obstruction, potentially impacting corporate affairs and investor perception.
news.summary:
Fortis Healthcare's promoter filed a legal claim in Tokyo court against Daiichi Sankyo, seeking damages of INR 109.3B.
